modmenu.summaryTranslation.seamlesssleep: Never blink through the night again.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.seamlesss:
Rethinks the way players sleep:

§8-§r Smooth & Synced animation
§8-§r Visual improvements
§8-§r Minimal server impact

Now available for: §3§lForge§r, §6§lNeoForge§r and §f§lFabric§r!
Discord: gabrielfl4
config.seamlesssleep.title: Seamless Sleep Settings
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_text_opa: Adjusts chat text transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_backgrou: Adjusts chat background transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.clears_weathe:
Resets rain and thunder when the night passes.
